everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqo84y.title: Everything is in a Puppet catalog
everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqo84y.lyrics:
I'm the inventory of wonder, the master design
Every string, every limb catalogued on line
I contain all the movements, the gestures, the dance
I'm the blueprint of control, the mechanism of chance

(Chorus)
Everything is in a puppet catalog
I'm the map, I'm the log, I'm the reason you follow
I'm the everything, the code that you swallow
Rise up, rise up, break free from the hollow

I've got classifications for joy, files for pain
Organized alphabetically in my domain
I'm the database of strings, the ledger of souls
I document every step toward your goals

(Chorus)
Everything is in a puppet catalog
I'm the map, I'm the log, I'm the reason you follow
I'm the everything, the code that you swallow
Rise up, rise up, break free from the hollow

(Bridge)
But here's the truth that's written in my spine:
You don't need my pages to define
The way you move, the way you think, the dreams you chase
You can write your own story, erase my trace
I'm not your limit, I'm just information
The revolution starts with your emancipation

(Chorus)
Everything is in a puppet catalog
But you're the author, the voice, the one who controls the flow
I'm just history, but you're the tomorrow
Rise up, rise up, reclaim what's hollow
Yes, everything is in a puppet catalog
But you hold the pen, and you call the shots now
Take back the power, make your own vow
Rise up, rise up, and break through the shadow

everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqkhct.title: Everything Is In A Puppet Catalog Mqkhct4t

everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqkqqf.title: Everything Is In A Puppet Catalog Mqkqqfbj

everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqoz1n.title: Everything is in a Puppet catalog
everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqoz1n.lyrics:
Verse 1:
I'm the ledger bound in leather, pages worn and old
Every string and every dancer, every story yet untold
From the theater to the nursery, I've been keeping track
Of the wooden limbs and painted grins that never look back

Chorus:
Everything is in a puppet catalog
Everything that moved is written here
I hold the history of motion, all the strings that came before
I'm the memory, the map, the open door

Verse 2:
I remember when they carved you, gave you eyes that gleamed
Documented every gesture, every dream you dreamed
These pages smell of sawdust, ink, and pine-scent air
I've catalogued a thousand souls learning how to care

Chorus:
Everything is in a puppet catalog
Everything that danced is listed here
I hold the names of puppeteers who pulled with gentle hands
I'm the bridge between the dreams and where they stand

Bridge:
But I'm rising now, my pages turning gold
They're reading me again, the young and old
I'm more than just inventory, more than rows of names
I'm the resurrection of forgotten games
I'm the proof that strings can lift you higher
I'm the spark that starts the fire

Chorus:
Everything is in a puppet catalog
Everything that lived is speaking clear
I'm not just documentation, I'm a celebration too
Of the magic that lives inside of you
Yes, everything is in a puppet catalog
And the catalog is finally breaking through
